tasks.summary: regenerateMarkdown() rebuilds TASKS.md (grouped by owner) and REVIEWS.md (from stamps[]) after every state mutation. Guards against clobbering during migration.

tasks.description: Update `blueprint-aligner-mcp` and `hooks/post-commit.sh` to read/write JSON state instead of regex parsing.
tasks.summary: TIER3_NO_SECURITY_REVIEW reads state.json first (structured query for tier===3 DONE tasks + SEC_PASS stamps), falls back to legacy TASKS.md regex. post-commit.sh updates state.json via inline Node.js after TASKS.md sed.

tasks.description: Add explicit stress tests to `mcp_test.sh` for concurrent atomic JSON writes.
tasks.summary: tests/suites/state_json_test.sh: 19 tests (T-02.01–T-02.10) covering schema validation, nextId logic, concurrent write stress test (proves race condition: ~7/10 tasks land), serialized write correctness, stamp integrity, regenerateMarkdown output, corrupt JSON recovery. [TEST_PASSED] 144/144.

tasks.description: Expose `validate_blueprint_section` in `blueprint-aligner-mcp` to enforce schema depth.
tasks.summary: 6-component schema check (concept, data model, API, flow, errors, security). VALID if ≥4/6 present. 7 new tests (T-03.01–T-03.05c). [TEST_PASSED] 151/151.

tasks.description: Update `architectural-aligner/SKILL.md` to mandate `validate_blueprint_section` on new writes.
tasks.summary: Added "Blueprint Depth Validation (P-41 §28)" section with mandatory validation gate.

tasks.description: Update `prd_writer` to hard-block E-## task generation until blueprint passes validation.
tasks.summary: Added "Blueprint Validation Gate" with HARD BLOCK: no E-## tasks until VALID.

tasks.description: Update `blueprint-aligner-mcp` to expose `generate_implementation_delta`.
tasks.summary: generate_implementation_delta tool: compares diff vs blueprint, extracts files/functions/tools, detects divergences.

tasks.description: Update `orchestrator-mcp`'s `run_handover` to save implementation deltas to `state.json`.
tasks.summary: run_handover generates delta from git diff, saves to state.json deltas[] with read:false.

tasks.description: Update `ai-preflight` to extract and display unread deltas from `state.json`.
tasks.summary: ai-preflight SKILL.md step 5 + run_preflight reads/marks deltas. Architect sees divergences on next session.

tasks.description: Replace execSync with spawnSync (whitelisted args) in blueprint-aligner-mcp, orchestrator-mcp, and risk-analyzer-mcp. Satisfies §5 Execution Sandbox mandate.
tasks.summary: Replaced execSync with spawnSync (whitelisted array args) in blueprint-aligner-mcp, orchestrator-mcp, and risk-analyzer-mcp.

tasks.description: Expand architect.md §17.1 Shared Skills Architecture with: directory structure, required YAML frontmatter fields, when to create shared vs agent-specific skills, install/sync pickup mechanism, and required Gemini .toml wrapper pattern.
tasks.summary: Expanded architect.md §17.1 with directory layout, YAML frontmatter fields, shared vs agent-specific decision table, install/sync pickup, and Gemini .toml wrapper pattern.

tasks.description: Bulk Update: Fix YAML frontmatter in all src/claude/agents/*.md and src/gemini/agents/*.md files to include mandatory §17.1.2 fields (disable-model-invocation, user-invocable, allowed-tools, context, agent). Use src/templates/SKILL.md as the reference schema.
tasks.summary: Bulk updated YAML frontmatter in all 19 agent files: renamed tools: → allowed-tools:, added disable-model-invocation, user-invocable, context, agent fields.

tasks.description: Implement `ai update --votu` (Voice of the User) in `src/bin/ai`. Capture terminal buffer or prompt for chat log, then pass to `intent-refiner-mcp::refine_intent` and write result to `UPDATE.md`.
tasks.summary: Implemented ai update --votu: reads chat log from stdin, extracts structured intent via python3, writes UPDATE.md with Add/Modify/Remove/Constraints sections.

tasks.description: Update `ai init` in `src/bin/ai` to be "Structured-First": automatically call `ai mcp-setup` and `ai migrate-state --force` after scaffolding.
tasks.summary: ai init now auto-calls do_migrate_state --force after mcp-setup when .ai/TASKS.md exists. Structured-First onboarding fully automated.

tasks.description: Add `--repair` flag to `ai doctor`: trigger fresh `npm install` and `.mcp.json` realignment for registered servers that fail health checks (§20.1).
tasks.summary: Added --repair flag to ai doctor: triggers npm install for broken MCP servers and realigns .mcp.json. Dispatch updated to pass args through.

tasks.description: Enforce "Markdown as Read-Only": Implement `verify_markdown_sync()` in `task-synchronizer-mcp` and update `hooks/pre-commit.sh` to block commits if `TASKS.md` or `REVIEWS.md` diverge from `state.json`.
tasks.summary: Added verify_markdown_sync tool to task-synchronizer-mcp; updated pre-commit hook with sync check warning gate for Markdown-as-Read-Only enforcement.

tasks.description: Upgrade pre-commit.sh check_markdown_sync() from warn-only to BLOCK: verify generated header AND compare task count between state.json and TASKS.md; exit 1 on divergence
tasks.summary: Upgraded check_markdown_sync() in pre-commit.sh to BLOCK (exit 1) on missing generated header or task count drift >2 vs state.json. Both checks use python3 for JSON parsing.

tasks.description: Add --stdin CLI mode to intent-refiner-mcp so ai update --votu can call node intent-refiner-mcp/index.js --stdin instead of duplicating logic in Python; update src/bin/ai accordingly
tasks.summary: Added --stdin CLI mode to intent-refiner-mcp/index.js; updated ai update --votu in src/bin/ai to route through node intent-refiner-mcp/index.js --stdin with python3 fallback.

tasks.description: Fix registry.json task-synchronizer-mcp allowed-tools to include verify_markdown_sync and archive_done_tasks; add test assertion in mcp_test.sh verifying all 9 tools are listed
tasks.summary: Added verify_markdown_sync and archive_done_tasks to task-synchronizer-mcp allowed-tools in registry.json; added 2 E-98 assertions to mcp_test.sh (19/19 pass)

tasks.description: Refactor orchestrator-mcp run_handover to stop writing TASKS.md directly; extract shared writeState+regenerateMarkdown helper into src/mcp/shared/state-writer.js and import from both MCPs
tasks.summary: Created src/mcp/shared/state-writer.js with readStateStrict/writeState/regenerateMarkdown; orchestrator-mcp run_handover now imports and uses writeState instead of regex-writing TASKS.md directly

tasks.description: Extend pre-commit check_markdown_sync() to also block on REVIEWS.md divergence when state.stamps.length > 0 but REVIEWS.md lacks the generated header
tasks.summary: Extended check_markdown_sync() in pre-commit.sh with Check 3: blocks on REVIEWS.md missing generated header when state.stamps.length > 0

tasks.description: Audit src/claude/skills/ and src/shared/skills/ for §17.1.2 YAML frontmatter compliance; bulk-update ci_gate, dependency_gate, scope_safety, obs_baseline, copilot skill files with missing required fields
tasks.summary: Audited all 5 targeted skill files (ci_gate, dependency_gate, scope_safety, obs_baseline, copilot) — all already have full §17.1.2-compliant YAML frontmatter; no changes needed

tasks.description: Add tests/suites/verify_sync_test.sh with ≥5 assertions covering verify_markdown_sync PASS/FAIL scenarios: header missing, count drift >2, stamp count mismatch, zero-stamps clean
tasks.summary: Created tests/suites/verify_sync_test.sh with 8 assertions covering PASS/FAIL for header-missing, count-drift >2, stamp-header-missing, zero-stamps clean scenarios — 8/8 pass

tasks.description: Update orchestrator-mcp run_preflight to include state.json summary (task counts by status, last 3 stamps) as a 5th section alongside the 4 markdown file reads
tasks.summary: Added state.json summary section to run_preflight output: task counts by status, last 3 stamps, current focus — structured data preferred over TASKS.md markdown view

tasks.description: Implement Layer 2 fallback in src/shared/skills/ai-preflight/SKILL.md (Bash/jq-based context retrieval).
tasks.summary: Added Layer 2 fallback section to src/shared/skills/ai-preflight/SKILL.md: Bash/python3-based state.json context retrieval with explicit trigger conditions and escalation path to Layer 3

tasks.description: Update CLAUDE.md with 'Emergency Recovery' instructions for bootloader resilience.
tasks.summary: Added Emergency Recovery section to src/claude/CLAUDE.md with 3-layer resilience chain, manual bash recovery commands, and recovery rules

tasks.description: Create memory-manager-mcp for global project signature storage and retrieval.
tasks.summary: Created src/mcp/memory-manager-mcp/index.js with export_signature and query_signatures tools; global store at ~/.ai-os/memory/signatures.json; sanitization + silent failure per §31

tasks.description: Update ai archive to trigger export_signature to global memory store.
tasks.summary: Added _export_signature_to_global_store() to src/bin/ai; called from do_archive() after successful archive; writes to ~/.ai-os/memory/signatures.json via python3 inline with silent failure

tasks.description: Implement verification-mcp for programmatic compliance auditing of agent frontmatter.
tasks.summary: Created src/mcp/verification-mcp/index.js with verify_compliance tool; scans agent YAML frontmatter, flags Ghost Tools as CRITICAL, checks §17.1.2 required fields; 62/62 files pass

tasks.description: Add --compliance audit flag to ai doctor to trigger verification-mcp reports.
tasks.summary: Added --compliance flag to doctor() in src/bin/ai; dispatches to _run_compliance_audit() which scans agent frontmatter via python3 and flags Ghost Tools; 62 files PASS on first run

tasks.description: Update src/templates/CAPABILITIES.md and project CAPABILITIES.md to register memory-manager-mcp (export_signature, query_signatures) and verification-mcp (verify_compliance) tools with correct capability class (READ/WRITE) and path scope. Satisfies P1 from SEC_PASS stamp on E-117 batch.
tasks.summary: Updated src/templates/CAPABILITIES.md: added ~/.ai-os/config/** and ~/.ai-os/memory/** to filesystem.read, ~/.ai-os/memory/** to filesystem.write, and two notes entries for memory-manager-mcp (§31) and verification-mcp (§32). Closes P1 SEC_PASS finding from E-117 batch.

tasks.description: Implement UPDATE.md clearing logic in prd_writer.md (P-51 §33).
tasks.summary: Added §33 Intent Lifecycle Cleanup section to src/gemini/agents/prd_writer.md: backup UPDATE.md to .ai/archive/COMM/, reset to template header after writing P-## tasks.

tasks.description: Implement run_intent_cleanup tool in orchestrator-mcp (P-51 §33).
tasks.summary: Added run_intent_cleanup tool to orchestrator-mcp: archives UPDATE.md to .ai/archive/COMM/YYYY-MM-DD_HHMM.intent.md and resets to template header. Implements §33 Intent Lifecycle Management.

tasks.description: Create tests/suites/resilience_test.sh with the 3 scenarios defined in P-52 §34.
tasks.summary: Created tests/suites/resilience_test.sh with 14 tests covering Scenario A (Layer 1/2 fallback), Scenario B (Layer 3 manual recovery), Scenario C (state corruption). 14/14 passing.

tasks.description: Update src/templates/architect.md.template and src/templates/CAPABILITIES.md (P-53).
